description: Retry button in DeletionFailureBanner uses #dd5b00 (Orange/Warn) for both background and message text, in violation of REQ-FEED-014 'Primary Blue #0075de'. Combined with FIND-001/FIND-002 this creates a token-collision: the destructive confirm button (DeleteConfirmModal.svelte:150 #dd5b00) and the recovery retry button (DeletionFailureBanner.svelte:68 #dd5b00) share the same chromatic affordance, undermining DESIGN.md's color semantics for warn vs primary action.
recommendation: Set retry-button background to #0075de, font-size 15px, weight 600, padding 8px 16px. Banner-message color should align with DESIGN.md error/warn text token (likely a near-black or warn-text token, not the same #dd5b00 used as accent border).
